scope.worker: Round347 private video boundary proof worker

learningProgressBlockers: missing FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 primary learning-progress store
parsed.learningProgressProductionBlocker: Learning progress production writes are blocked until Cloudflare Pages production binds FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2; write_quota_exceeded or KV fallback is not production write recovery.
parsed.privateVideoProductionBlocker: Private-video production recovery is blocked until Cloudflare Pages production binds FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2; KV-only fallback is not a complete private-media server boundary.

privateVideoActionMatrix.boundary: List/read metadata can be audited, but it is not upload/delete/archive recovery.
Saving the same assigned student is a no-op confirmation; it is usable but not a storage-write recovery proof.
Dry-run is a preflight only; it must never be counted as destructive delete completion.
Delete can only be a limited metadata-first revoke: dry-run and typed confirmation may run, but complete storage cleanup and production recovery stay blocked until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is bound.
Upload/publish is blocked until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is bound.
Access changes are blocked until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is bound.
Archive is blocked until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is bound.

parsed.productionBlocker: Learning progress production writes are blocked until Cloudflare Pages production binds FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2; write_quota_exceeded or KV fallback is not production write recovery. Private-video production recovery is blocked until Cloudflare Pages production binds FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2; KV-only fallback is not a complete private-media server boundary.

privateVideo.boundary: Private-video production recovery is blocked until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is bound; KV-only fallback is not a complete private-media server boundary.

learningProgress.boundary: Learning progress is at most degraded no-drift through KV fallback; it is not full production readiness until FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 exists.

blocking: missing FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 primary learning-progress store
parsed.expectedFailure: Expected exit 2 until production bindings are fixed: missing FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 binding; missing FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 primary learning-progress store.
parsed.message: Cloudflare Pages production binding audit is not fully ready. Private-video recovery requires FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2; fully durable learning progress requires FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2. Current learning progress resolves to kv-single-write-fallback, with FM_PROGRESS_DB missing=true and FM_PROGRESS_R2 missing=true; kv-single-write-fallback/write_quota_exceeded is a degraded no-drift state, not full production readiness. Delete remains a separate limited path that requires dry-run, typed confirmation, and real-account QA.

r2Boundary.currentBindingMessage: Cloudflare Pages production binding audit is not fully ready. Private-video recovery requires FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2; fully durable learning progress requires FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2. Current learning progress resolves to kv-single-write-fallback, with FM_PROGRESS_DB missing=true and FM_PROGRESS_R2 missing=true; kv-single-write-fallback/write_quota_exceeded is a degraded no-drift state, not full production readiness. Delete remains a separate limited path that requires dry-run, typed confirmation, and real-account QA.
r2Boundary.blocker: Cloudflare Pages production lacks FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 in current proof; upload/publish, true access change, archive, and storage-backed cleanup remain blocked.

checks.description: Admin list endpoint exposes GET/HEAD list plus limits without media mutation.
Same-access save returns noop before metadata writes.
Delete dry-run is separated from real delete and returns canDelete/readiness.
Teacher panel visibly marks action states and blocker reason.
Teacher panel gates upload/publish/change/archive before mutation calls.
Teacher delete flow runs dry-run before irreversible confirmation and exact course ID.
Resources page exposes the private-video management action matrix without claiming recovery.
Resources page explains delete dry-run, exact course ID, and system read-only courses.
Resources page routes teachers to management and students to playback status.
Round340/Round334 expose the expected 3 ready, 1 limited, 3 blocked split.
list, same-access-save, and delete-dry-run are visible and ready.
upload/publish, change-access, and archive are blocked.

acceptance.meaning: Round347 proves visible safe actions and external blockers without claiming production private-video recovery.
